_source: ShadowBuyer standard MSA template — our negotiating baseline.

clauses.title: Limitation of Liability
clauses.text: Vendor's aggregate liability is capped at the greater of (a) twelve (12) months of fees paid in the trailing year or (b) $1,000,000.

clauses.title: Indemnification
clauses.text: Vendor will defend, indemnify, and hold Customer harmless from third-party claims arising from Vendor's IP infringement, gross negligence, or willful misconduct.

clauses.title: Data Processing Addendum
clauses.text: Standard SCCs and DPA attached as Exhibit A. Customer data may not be used for model training without written consent. Data residency: US-East.

clauses.title: Data Deletion on Termination
clauses.text: Vendor shall delete all Customer data within thirty (30) days of termination and provide written certification of deletion.

clauses.title: Auto-Renewal
clauses.text: Subscription auto-renews for successive 12-month terms unless either party gives written notice at least thirty (30) days before the current term ends.

clauses.title: Price Lock
clauses.text: Per-unit pricing is locked for the initial term. Year-2 and beyond price increases capped at five percent (5%) annually.

clauses.title: Termination for Convenience
clauses.text: Customer may terminate this Agreement for convenience upon sixty (60) days written notice, with a pro-rated refund of prepaid fees.

clauses.title: SLA Credits
clauses.text: Service Levels: 99.9% monthly uptime. Credits issued as 10% of monthly fee for each 0.1% below target, up to 100% of monthly fee.

clauses.title: Subprocessors
clauses.text: Vendor maintains a public list of subprocessors. Customer has the right to object to new subprocessors within fifteen (15) days of notice; failure to resolve objection allows termination.

clauses.title: Audit Rights
clauses.text: Customer may audit Vendor's compliance once per year on thirty (30) days' notice. Vendor will provide SOC 2 Type II reports annually.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text: Confidentiality obligations survive for five (5) years after termination. Trade secrets protected indefinitely.

clauses.title: IP Assignment
clauses.text: Each party retains its pre-existing IP. Customer owns all data and any derivatives. Vendor owns the Service and improvements thereto.

clauses.title: Warranty
clauses.text: Vendor warrants the Service will materially conform to documentation and be free from material defects. Sole remedy: re-performance or refund.

clauses.title: Governing Law & Venue
clauses.text: Delaware law. Disputes resolved by binding arbitration in San Francisco, California under AAA Commercial Rules.
